root.sql:
SELECT sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code_desc, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description, count( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) as c_count, sum( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance ) as c_balance
FROM sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code, sc_acc_m_account_master WHERE ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code ) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance <> 0 ) ) and sc_lon_m_rule.invest_status = '0' GROUP BY sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code_desc, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description /*WHERE*/

r_ktm_day_balance_by_loan_code_nest.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code, count( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as c_count, sum( sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock) as c_amt, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_share_mem, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type ) and ( ( sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock > 0 ) ) GROUP BY sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc

r_ktm_day_balance_by_loan_code_nest_sex_.sql: select sex, count(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)as count from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_share_mem where member_status_code = '0' and sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock > 0 group by sex

r_ktm_day_balance_by_loan_code_nest_coun.sql: SELECT count( distinct( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no) ) as c_count FROM sc_lon_m_loan_card WHERE sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0
